orchestrationDecisions.reason: The assigned worker owns one isolated sub-issue worktree and bounded files; no further delegation is authorized or required.
Deterministic RED tests fail because the two production adapter modules are absent; implementation may now begin.
The minimal typed Git and workspace adapter implementation is confined to the assigned production files.
Focused tests pass 16/16, the Shepherd suite passes 153/153, and strict production TypeScript passes after safety refactoring.
Focused issue tests, full Shepherd tests, strict TypeScript, offline Pi extension discovery, and diff hygiene pass; parent policy centralizes full Go/connectors reruns.
Issue evidence is complete and the branch is ready for a stacked PR and independent exact-head review.
The three review blockers are coupled inside the two issue-owned adapters; RED identity, immutable-claim, and exclusive-lease regressions precede production corrections.
Focused tests produced five deterministic failures: identity mismatch, dual same-owner mutators, missing recovery capability, mutable handoff acceptance, and missing persisted scopes.
The same 21 focused tests now pass and strict production TypeScript passes after v1 identity alignment, immutable two-phase claim binding, and FileStateStore lease integration.
Remote-form identity parity, direct handoff tampering, stale-start guidance, explicit resume, and idempotent release evidence were strengthened without widening capabilities.
Focused 21/21, serialized full Shepherd 158/158, strict TypeScript, offline Pi RPC, and exact diff/scope gates pass; no Go or connector gate ran.
PR #484 and concrete reviewed/correction checkpoint evidence are recorded; fresh exact-head independent review remains parent-owned.
